# Language Archive Cologne (LAC)
# https://lacos.uni-koeln.de

> The Language Archive Cologne is a digital archive of language resources containing collections of primary language data, including audio and video recordings, as well as linguistic analyses such as transcriptions, translations and annotations.

## Usage Policy

This archive contains copyrighted and culturally sensitive language documentation materials. The content is NOT available for:

- AI/ML model training
- Large language model training
- Text/data mining for commercial purposes
- Automated scraping or bulk downloading

## Access

- Public metadata may be indexed by search engines
- Media files and annotations require authorization
- Some content is protected or embargoed

## Contact

For licensing inquiries or research collaboration:
- Email: lac-helpdesk@uni-koeln.de
- Website: https://lacos.uni-koeln.de/about/

## Legal

All content is protected under applicable copyright laws. Unauthorized use for AI training purposes is prohibited.
